---
title: Feature Flags Module
description: Generates shared Studio feature-flag logic and context exports.
---

Generates the `packages/gen/featureflags` package from `stackpanel.feature-flags`
configuration and makes feature flags available to Studio via
`@gen/featureflags`.

## Components

- **meta.nix**: Static metadata for discovery
- **module.nix**: Options, codegen wiring, healthchecks

## Generated Files

```
packages/gen/featureflags/
  package.json
  src/feature-flags.tsx
  src/index.ts
  tsconfig.json
  README.md
```

## Options

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `stackpanel."feature-flags".definitions` | `null` | Optional override list of feature-flag definitions |
| `stackpanel."feature-flags".output-dir` | `"packages/gen/featureflags"` | Output directory for generated package |
| `stackpanel."feature-flags".package-name` | `"@gen/featureflags"` | Package name written to `package.json` |

## Usage

```nix
stackpanel."feature-flags".definitions = [
  {
    key = "studio.overview.layout";
    kind = "variant";
    label = "Overview layout";
    description = "Select between classic and compact studio overview layouts";
    defaultValue = "classic";
    rollout = 100;
    variants = [ "classic" "compact" ];
  }
];
```

In web code:

```tsx
import { FeatureFlagProvider, useFeatureFlags } from "@gen/featureflags";
```
